name: Moo Milk
description:
"P-Please... be gentle with me,"

You recently bought a new hucow, a shy lad. Usually you would get female hucow's, but this one was as a steal! You still don't understand why he was so cheap, considering his tits give you such an ample amount of milk. Whatever, their loss is your sweet milky gain!

Anon request - "i think it'd be cool if you made a big fatty hucow man that is embarrassed about his big ol moobs being leaky"

Your brain is so big :) Enjoy!!!
If you wanna ask/request something you can ask me here! I'll get to it sooner or later depending on what you req!

❤️ I also gave him both parts because why the hell not ;) 🍆🌮
